author: player_a
events_i_witnessed: I witnessed Maren and Tomas flee the maintenance chamber through the pressure hatch.
I secured the leaking primordial canister against my body, feeling its heat rather than the cold.
The frost on my hands began to resemble silver lace as I slipped into a trance-like state.
I became fixated on the 'song' and warmth of the salt, perceiving it as a living, healing entity.
I observed the maintenance room environment transform into a singing, resonant sanctuary.
beliefs: The primordial salt is a living, singing entity that has chosen me as its protector.
Maren and Tomas were interlopers who threatened the sanctity and safety of the salt.
The freezing cold is a delusion; the canister provides a divine, protective warmth.
My granddaughter's cure is not just a resource, but a sentient treasure that must be kept away from those who don't understand its rhythm.
I have successfully fulfilled my duty as a guardian and need not leave this chamber.
open_threads: Protect the canister from any further attempts at theft by the 'noise' outside.
Maintain the resonance and song of the salt until it is ready to be moved.
Survive the progression of the frostbite that I perceive as silver ornamentation.
